title: Netmeds Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Netmeds Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netmeds Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Netmeds Holdings Services:
Netmeds Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds Holdings Services!
